title: MrShulker-Flat GUI View Companion
description: Rotates Shulker boxes to a top - down view to better display your lid items with the MrShulker mod
body:
This is an optional companion resource pack for use with the MrShulker mod. It rotates the GUI view of shulker boxes to a slightly zoomed in top down angle to better display what you have attached to those shulker boxes.

View without the companion pack:  
![GUI view without the companion pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IApfqAkB/images/957666586815ec6350df550c4707fc786ecfce9a.png)  

View with the companion pack:  
![GUI view with companion pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IApfqAkB/images/4717377839df0617593a467470547ff4702c393f.png)
